roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Issued
HG WHET PROB SHD REM REV
HG WHET PROB SHD REM REV
DEFT ABS;BW;NO BAIL
TRANSF TO D21 FOR HG REV PROB BY APD AT 9AM ON 8/16/94
BAIL SET AT $1000;CONT 7/13/94 TS HG REV PROB BY APD AT 9AM IN D22
BWR-6/11/94;CNSL RET;CONT 6/16/94 REV PROB BY APD IN D22 9AM/MO REL OR
CONT TO 6/15/94 FOR FTA-MTR/APD AT 9AM IN D22
FTA;BW NB;PROB REV;MTR/APD-GRTD;O/C
A/JWV;ISS3YPROB;CTS244D;WS;O/P REST;S/A FR H&S MARKET;$40PC;$100RF
DEFT W/D NG PLEA CT2;ADV/WVD CONSTL RTS;PLD G CT2/2NDDEG;CT MKES FNDGSCT ACCEPTS PLEA
DEFT PERS WVS TIME
JURY FND DEFT NG CT1/187PC/1STDEG;CT2-DEG/2NDDEG DECL MISTRL
ORAL MO FOR MISTRL BY DEFT'S CNSL DEN
DEFT CNSL ORAL MO STRK TESTIMNY KLOTZ/C RE MACHANISM DRAWER DENMO NOT TO CALL SUYEHIRO/D AS AN EXPERT WITNESS DEN
DEFENSE CNSL/DEFT MKES ORAL MO MISTRIAL DEN
MO DISALLOW TESTIMNY MIRISCAL/M & EXCL STATEMENT OF CO-DEFT DEN
MO SEVER DENMO AD LIMINE EXCL STATEMTS VIO MIRANDA/PRIVILEGE AGAINST SELF INCREM DEN
DEEMED PRETRIED
MO TO REDUCE BAIL-DENIED
MO FOR DISCOVERY-GRTD
MO 995PC GRTD AS TO CT3,MO DEN AS TO CTS1,2
ARR ON CT1;REMAINDER OF INFO WVD;PLD NG EA CT
DEFT MOT REDUCE BAIL DENIED, PX DATE TO STAND (1-28-91)
